title: Format-json output path silently swallows JSON parse failures — step completes with output: undefined
body: step-agent.ts lines 232-238: the format-json path (no schema) caught JSON.parse exceptions and silently left output undefined. Step completed successfully with no output. persistStepOutput then wrote { text: garbage } to the output file. Downstream steps accessing steps.X.output.field got undefined — cascading failures untraceable to the silent swallow. Block writes are fatal on validation failure; this path was not, violating the principle from dec-009 that ungated paths next to gated ones are not enforcement.
resolved_by: v0.11.3 commit b614be4 — parse failure now marks step as failed, same contract as schema-bound path
